prompt_text: A kneeling young male servant of a noble mansion, humble and tense, plain dark brown ancient Chinese servant robe, both hands holding a cloth-wrapped parcel with one corner exposed; behind him on the left stands Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura; behind him on the right stands Shen Ci, a tall aristocratic young man from ancient China, cold and elegant, sharp long eyes, pale skin, high nose bridge, thin lips, black hair in a neat topknot with jade crown, wearing dark blue and black embroidered hanfu, restrained noble aura, subtle obsession and sorrow in his expression. The servant bows low in fearful testimony while Gao Lingning and Shen Ci loom over him in a pressuring triangle, their expressions tightened as if locking onto crucial evidence. Noble mansion front hall doorway, dimming evening sky in the background, old wooden threshold, austere interior, parcel edge visible in the foreground, low-saturation palette of gray-green, dark ink black, aged wood brown, faint amber candlelight colliding with cool dusk light. Cinematic historical drama realism, medium shot, static camera, precise triangular composition, shallow depth of field, high detail fabric texture, restrained tension, filmic contrast, Song dynasty aesthetics.
